_instructions: One entry per YouTube channel. Read by motion_designer, graphic_designer, and brand_guardian. Source of truth for all visual brand decisions.

WARPMUZ.thumbnail_layout: Dominant subject center-left. Song title large top-right or bottom-left, high contrast against dark background. Artist name smaller, below title. Cool/desaturated color temperature.
WARPMUZ.target_audience: Adults 25–50 who listen to cinematic and emotional music

_notes: Add a new channel entry for each YouTube channel you operate.
color_grade_preset must match one of: cinematic_teal_orange | warm_vintage | dark_moody | clean_pop | cold_drama
thumbnail_layout: describe your thumbnail formula in plain English so image_generator and graphic_designer can follow it.
Keep this file consistent with Brand/channel_brief.md.
